attacking_style: Late-race attacks in final 1-2km on summit finishes, often animated but lacks sustained acceleration to distance stronger climbers. Rarely initiates decisive moves, more reactive to others' attacks.
team_tactics: Frequently deployed as initial attacker or domestique despite GC ambitions, showing tactical flexibility. Often races tactically isolated without meaningful teammate support on decisive climbs.
terrain_preference: Summit finishes on sustained climbs where power-to-weight advantages play out. Exposed on explosive/punchy circuits requiring repeated accelerations and vulnerable on technical descents.
vulnerability: Catastrophic positioning errors on flat stages leading to crashes outside 3km safety zones (2+ incidents). Mechanical issues and technical descents have eliminated GC chances multiple times. Lacks acceleration to follow when pace lifts sharply.
key_patterns: Crashes outside 3km safety zones on flat/transitional stages repeatedly cost major GC time (3 documented)
Mechanical issues on critical climbs expose fragility in high-pressure moments (2 major incidents)
Animated final kilometers with multiple late attacks but rarely initiates decisive winning moves
Used as domestique/initial attacker despite GC status, sacrificing personal ambitions for teammates
Maintains top-10 power at age 39+ but lacks explosive acceleration for modern GC racing
Technical descents after summit finishes represent elimination risk, not just time loss
form_trajectory: neutral: Maintained surprising resilience and top-10 power at age 39 in 2022, but crashes/mechanicals rather than fitness ended GC bids
